mapper.sql: q.id, q.task_type, q.title, q.description, COALESCE( ( SELECT bir.file_url FROM biz_image_resource bir WHERE bir.target_type = 'WRITING_QUESTION' AND bir.target_id = q.id AND bir.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY bir.sort_order ASC, bir.id ASC LIMIT 1 ), q.image_url ) AS image_url, COALESCE( ( SELECT bir.object_key FROM biz_image_resource bir WHERE bir.target_type = 'WRITING_QUESTION' AND bir.target_id = q.id AND bir.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY bir.sort_order ASC, bir.id ASC LIMIT 1 ), q.image_object_key ) AS image_object_key, q.is_deleted, q.deleted_time, q.created_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO writing_question ( task_type, title, description, image_url, image_object_key, is_deleted, deleted_time, created_time ) VALUES ( #{taskType}, #{title}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{imageObjectKey}, #{isDeleted}, #{deletedTime}, #{createdTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE writing_question SET task_type = #{taskType}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, image_object_key = #{imageObjectKey} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM writing_question q WHERE q.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY q.created_time DESC, q.id DESC

SELECT
FROM writing_question q WHERE q.id = #{id} AND q.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM writing_question q WHERE q.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE writing_question SET is_deleted = 0, deleted_time = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 1
mapper.select:
select
from writing_question where image_target_migrated = 0 order by id asc
